'''thazhozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicanartine|nicanartine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-zh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicanartine|nicanartine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thazhozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæzhezeth|thæzhezeth]] || [[word:thæzhezej|thæzhezej]] || [[word:thæzhezesh|thæzhezesh]] || [[word:thæzheze|thæzheze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thazhozhozoth|thazhozhozoth]] || [[word:thazhozhozoj|thazhozhozoj]] || [[word:thazhozhozosh|thazhozhozosh]] || [[word:thazhozhozo|thazhozhozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhozoth|thazhozoth]] || [[word:thazhozoj|thazhozoj]] || [[word:thazhozosh|thazhozosh]] || [[word:thazhozo|thazhozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhofzoth|thazhofzoth]] || [[word:thazhofzoj|thazhofzoj]] || [[word:thazhofzosh|thazhofzosh]] || [[word:thazhofzof|thazhofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thazhozotho|thazhozotho]] || [[word:thazhozojo|thazhozojo]] || [[word:thazhozosho|thazhozosho]] || [[word:thazhozoko|thazhozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thazhozoth|thazhozoth]] || [[word:thazhozoj|thazhozoj]] || [[word:thazhozosh|thazhozosh]] || [[word:thazhozo|thazhozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thazhozothol|thazhozothol]] || [[word:thazhozojol|thazhozojol]] || [[word:thazhozoshol|thazhozoshol]] || [[word:thazhozokol|thazhozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thazhozothotho|thazhozothotho]] || [[word:thazhozojojo|thazhozojojo]] || [[word:thazhozoshosho|thazhozoshosho]] || [[word:thazhozoko|thazhozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thazhozothon|thazhozothon]] || [[word:thazhozojon|thazhozojon]] || [[word:thazhozoshon|thazhozoshon]] || [[word:thazhozokon|thazhozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thazhozothoro|thazhozothoro]] || [[word:thazhozojoro|thazhozojoro]] || [[word:thazhozoshoro|thazhozoshoro]] || [[word:thazhozokoro|thazhozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
